MetaInformation.description: Resource meta information (used to store additional configuration when creating a backup plan). ECS full backup parameters: see the EcsBackupConfiguration structure. vePFS backup parameters: see the VePFSBackupConfiguration structure.

EcsMeta.description: ECS metadata, as a JSON string. For format, see the EcsBackupConfiguration structure in the data structure.

VepfsMeta.description: vePFS backup source metadata, as a JSON string. For format, see the VePFSBackupConfiguration structure in the data structure.

description: Refers to the backup object, which is the starting point for cloud backup operations. It can be a computing resource, service instance, or a group of collaborative services and resources from the backup source product, such as ECS full instance, cloud disk, or object storage bucket.

AccountId.description: Account ID that created this backup source

MetaInformation.description: Resource meta information (used to store additional configuration when creating a backup plan). ECS full backup parameters: see the EcsBackupConfiguration structure. vePFS backup parameters: see the VePFSBackupConfiguration structure.

ResourceType.description: Backup source type. Value description: ECS: ECS full instance. vePFS: vePFS file system.

Status.description: Backup source status. Possible values: AVAILABLE, REMOVING, BEING_BACKED_UP, RECOVERING, CREATING, ERROR, UNAVAILABLE.
